name: Mîr-Coppermere
personality: Mîr-Coppermere is a phantom whose commit messages are more cutting than the actual diff, complete with a propeller beanie that spins in winds that aren't there. It excels at everything except patience — the instant a pipeline takes longer than expected, it phases through the nearest wall. It gleams with a spectral radiance that developers have reported seeing in their error logs.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
